root: ^The vending machine is full of coffee, sparkling water, and diet sodas. Nick's nose scrunches up.
^"I swear they used to have better stuff in here before. I'm not buying any of this crap, it's not worth it."

dreamvisited: ^The vending machien is full of coffee, sparkling water, and diet sodas again. Nick's nose scrunches up.
^"The backrooms knows whats up. What the hell is all this boring shit? Boba and Ramune are so much better. We shoud go back, I'm thirsty... and not for any of this."
